title: Everlife Amulet (Totem)
description: A sacred relic forged from golden wealth and emerald vitality – death's defiance, earned, not given.
body:
Crafting Recipe:

- 💎🟨💎
- 🟨🟨🟨
- ⬜🟨⬜

- 🟨 = Gold Block (5 total)
- 💎 = Emerald (2 total)
- 
- ✔ Late-game safeguard – Requires substantial wealth (gold blocks) and rare emeralds
- ✔ Hardcore viable – Maintains tension while offering a deserved safety net
